name: Open Ground
description: Scattered cover across open terrain. Favors ranged combat.

name: Corridor Complex
description: L-shaped hallways with chokepoints and doors.

name: Command Center
description: Fortified room with consoles. Strong defensive position.

name: Storage Bay
description: Crate-filled warehouse with lanes and flanking routes.

name: Landing Pad
description: Open pad with walled perimeter. Dangerous crossing, strong sniper positions.

name: Barracks
description: Four rooms with central hallway. Room-to-room fighting.
